haftalar.kazanim: E11.1.1 — Discussing future careers and job market
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students discuss job trends and requirements using future perfect and continuous.

haftalar.kazanim: E11.1.2 — Writing a CV and cover letter
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students write formal CV and cover letter using professional language.
Students describe their skills and hobbies using gerunds and infinitives.
Students use exclamatory structures and emphatic expressions to talk about personal interests.

haftalar.kazanim: E11.3.1 — Discussing social problems and challenges
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students discuss difficult social situations and problems using third conditional and wish.

haftalar.kazanim: E11.3.2 — Expressing regret and speculation about past
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students use modal perfect (could have/should have/might have) to express past regret.
Students discuss various forms of entertainment using complex noun phrases.

haftalar.kazanim: E11.4.2 — Writing a film or book review
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students write a structured review expressing opinions and recommendations.

haftalar.kazanim: E11.5.1 — Discussing current events and media
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students report current events using reported speech and passive constructions.
Students write a news article following journalistic structure and formal style.
Students discuss emotional experiences using complex adjective structures and metaphors.

haftalar.kazanim: E11.6.2 — Writing a personal narrative essay
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students write a personal narrative using advanced discourse markers.
Students analyze a biographical text and identify key language features.

haftalar.kazanim: E11.7.2 — Relative and adverbial clauses in writing
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students use complex relative and adverbial clauses to write detailed life stories.
Students evaluate credibility of online sources and express critical opinions.

haftalar.kazanim: E11.8.2 — Writing an argumentative essay: technology
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students write an argumentative essay on a technology issue using academic vocabulary.

haftalar.kazanim: AYT English review: grammar and vocabulary
